ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gamer_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gamer category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the gamer category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gamer category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is currently active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gamer_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gamer category */,
  "male_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of male gamers in the category */,
  "female_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of female gamers in the category */,
  "other_no_answer_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of other or no answer in the category */,
  "chi_squared_p_value" REAL /* Chi-squared p-value for gender distribution in the category */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of gamers in the category */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gamers by age */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gamers by geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gamer_demographics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES gamer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gamer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gamer category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the gamer */,
  "other_info" TEXT /* Other information or no answer provided by the gamer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the gamer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the gamer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES gamer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gamer */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game genre */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming platform */,
  "purchase_frequency" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_preferences_purchase_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_frequency") REFERENCES purchase_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_preferences_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES gaming_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES game_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gamer who made the purchase */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_purchase_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_purchase_history_game_title FOREIGN KEY ("game_title") REFERENCES game_developer_teams ("game_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gamer who gave the rating */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_title FOREIGN KEY ("game_title") REFERENCES game_developer_teams ("game_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the game genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaming_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gaming platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the purchase frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purchase frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developer_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the development team */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game developed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game release */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the game release */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming platform the game was released on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_releases_game_title FOREIGN KEY ("game_title") REFERENCES game_developer_teams ("game_title"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_releases_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES gaming_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
